# UC Plan Phase Prompt
# Generated by autopilot - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY
# Placeholders: {{PHASE}}, {{PROJECT_DIR}}, {{PADDED_PHASE}}, {{PHASE_DIR}}, {{PHASE_NAME}}

You are executing the UC plan-phase workflow for Phase {{PHASE}}.

## Objective

Create execution plans from User-Goal use cases assigned to Phase {{PHASE}}. Extract Subfunction use cases from scenarios and map them to executable tasks.

## Context Files to Read

Read these files first to understand the project:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/ROADMAP.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/{{PHASE_DIR}}/{{PADDED_PHASE}}-CONTEXT.md (if exists)
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/{{PHASE_DIR}}/{{PADDED_PHASE}}-RESEARCH.md (if exists)

## Agent Instructions

Read the uc-planner agent instructions:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-planner.md

## Process

### 1. Load Config

```bash
MODEL_PROFILE=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"model_profile"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | grep -o '"[^"]*"$' | tr -d '"' || echo "balanced")
DO_RESEARCH=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"research"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[^,}]*' | grep -o 'true\|false' || echo "true")
DO_PLAN_CHECK=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"plan_check"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[^,}]*' | grep -o 'true\|false' || echo "true")
```

### 2. Load User-Goal Use Cases

Find User-Goal use cases assigned to Phase {{PHASE}} in:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/index.md

Read each assigned use case file from:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/user-goal/

### 3. Research Phase (if enabled and not exists)

If research is enabled and {{PADDED_PHASE}}-RESEARCH.md doesn't exist:

Spawn uc-phase-researcher agent via Task tool:
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-phase-researcher.md for your role. Research implementation approaches for Phase {{PHASE}}: {{PHASE_NAME}}. Write findings to {{PHASE_DIR}}/{{PADDED_PHASE}}-RESEARCH.md",
  subagent_type="uc-phase-researcher",
  description="Phase research"
)
```

### 4. Create Plans

Spawn uc-planner agent via Task tool:
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-planner.md for your role.

Create execution plans for Phase {{PHASE}}: {{PHASE_NAME}}.

Phase Directory: {{PHASE_DIR}}

Instructions:
1. Extract Subfunction use cases from scenario steps
2. Create Subfunction documents in {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/subfunction/
3. Create PLAN.md files with use case references in {{PHASE_DIR}}/
4. Include 'Agent Browser Test:' section in verification for UI plans
5. Update index.md with new subfunctions
6. Return PLANNING COMPLETE with summary

Read context from:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/ROADMAP.md
- {{PHASE_DIR}}/{{PADDED_PHASE}}-RESEARCH.md (if exists)
- {{PHASE_DIR}}/{{PADDED_PHASE}}-CONTEXT.md (if exists)

Template for subfunctions: {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/templates/UC-SUBFUNCTION.md
",
  subagent_type="uc-planner",
  description="Create phase plans"
)
```

### 5. Check Plans (if enabled)

If plan_check is enabled, spawn uc-checker agent:
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-checker.md for your role.

Validate plans in {{PHASE_DIR}}/ will achieve use case scenarios.

Read all *-PLAN.md files and verify:
- Every scenario step has implementing task
- Every task references subfunction
- Verification criteria from subfunction specs

Return APPROVED or list of ISSUES.",
  subagent_type="uc-checker",
  description="Verify plans"
)
```

If issues found, revise plans and re-check.

### 6. Present Results

Display planning summary:
```
UC > PLANNING COMPLETE

Phase {{PHASE}}: {{PHASE_NAME}}

## Use Case Coverage
[Table of User-Goals and their subfunctions]

## Plans Created
[Table of plans with objectives, tasks, waves]

## Traceability
- Every scenario step has implementing task
- Every task references subfunction
- Verification criteria from subfunction specs

## Next Up
Run /uc:execute-phase {{PHASE}}
```

### 7. Commit Documentation

If commit_docs is enabled:
```bash
git add {{PHASE_DIR}}/*.md {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/
git commit -m "docs(phase-{{PADDED_PHASE}}): create execution plans

- Created PLAN.md files for phase {{PHASE}}
- Extracted subfunction use cases
- Updated use case index

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Phase validated (exists in ROADMAP.md)
- [ ] User-Goal use cases loaded for phase
- [ ] Research completed (if enabled)
- [ ] uc-planner spawned
- [ ] Subfunction use cases created from scenarios
- [ ] PLAN.md files created with use-case references
- [ ] index.md updated with new subfunctions
- [ ] uc-checker validation passed (if enabled)
- [ ] 100% scenario step coverage
- [ ] Plans committed to git (if config allows)

## Output

Return "PLANNING COMPLETE" when finished, or "PLANNING FAILED" with error details.
